name: Princess Tiana Kids' Pillow Buddy - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Let your child cherish the spirt of adventure and fulfill their dreams with this Princess Tiana Kids' Pillow Buddy from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™. Featuring Tiana from The Princess and the Frog in her iconic princess gown with finely crafted detailing and poseable legs, this figural doll is perfect for an enchanted storytime, snuggles and more.
